propositions: Set identity.require_authenticated=true and pin enforce_since to the 8d91 anchor SHA in a single atomic rebar.toml change.
Before flipping, validate over a window that no active writer emits unsigned non-SNAPSHOT in-scope events, since concurrent agents on old pre-0ba4 worktree builds still write unsigned txn events.

Demonstrate enforcement is real (merge-gate rejects forged/unsigned post-boundary events, local write-gate refuses unsignable non-exempt writes) in isolated temp stores without polluting the shared store.
Confirm every in-scope writer surface (local, CI reconcile-bridge, Gerrit review-bot LINK) signs and verifies under enforcement with no red pushes on main.
Provide a documented fast-revert rollback path that sets require_authenticated=false as a single Gerrit change if a writer surface fails post-flip.
The CI failure was an enrich-drain concurrency test relying on the old default; fix its worker to run enforcement-agnostic rather than a verify-identity or anchor problem.
